gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor stands tall, smiles widely, and gestures with both hands invitingly while stating the lesson topic
a person moves slightly forward, raises both arms with open palms, and nods enthusiastically to engage learners
a tutor bends slightly at the waist, points forward with one hand, and confidently indicates the number five
a person takes a step forward, extends both arms wide, and demonstrates a big jumping motion as if visualizing the jump
a tutor turns toward the class, claps hands together excitedly, and beams with pride while sharing the answer ten
a person holds up one hand with fingers spread wide, and gently moves it side to side while saying five
a tutor gestures with the other hand, mimicking the five fingers again, while encouraging students to join in
a person stands tall, brings both hands together over the fingers, and opens arms wide while inviting responses about the total
a tutor steps back slightly, claps hands joyfully, and smiles broadly while praising the students for their efforts
a person raises both hands with fingers making a big ten gesture, and nods affirmatively while reinforcing the concept
